source_files: data/COT/Potato Pests and Diseases Identification Decision Tree1.xlsx
notes: This JSON is generated from expert-provided COT files.
Some rows in the decision-tree workbook contain mixed or shifted disease labels; raw row-level provenance is preserved.
Use disease_profiles + question_bank as primary machine-readable structures for yes/no narrowing.
